## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.10

### 🎥 Recordings
- Registers the X-Sense Recordings sidebar, playback panel, recording services, and background media sync only when the loaded X-Sense account has camera devices.
- Removes the recordings sidebar, hidden playback panel, and recording services when no loaded X-Sense entry has cameras, including after the last camera entry is unloaded.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for camera-gated recordings setup, unregister helpers, and last-camera unload cleanup.
- Validates the integration with the full test suite.
